name: Vintage Bar
comment: Vintage Bar combines a retro amber blinder effect with vibrant RGBL background LEDs, offering rich multi-color eye candy effects and smooth dimming. With advanced strobe, pixel control, and versatile connectivity, it’s perfect for creative stage and event lighting setups.

capabilities.comment: Rnd Strobe Slow to Fast Amber
Rnd Strobe Slow to Fast RGBL
